metadata.title: Juan Tzun | Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Juan Tzun's professional portfolio: full-stack projects with Java, Spring Boot, Angular, React, PostgreSQL, Docker, and applied AI.

hero.title: I build full-stack web platforms focused on operations, data, and applied AI.
hero.description: I am a full-stack developer with experience in Java, Spring Boot, Angular, React, PostgreSQL, Docker, and AI-powered solutions. This portfolio brings together projects designed as real products, with clear architecture, deployment strategy, and practical use cases.

projectGrid.title: Projects designed as real products
projectGrid.description: Each project is designed to showcase full-stack architecture, product thinking, deployment, data, applied AI, and real-world problem solving.

tamias.description: Operational management platform for small rental businesses: reservations, maintenance, purchases, inventory, documents, and an AI assistant.

knowledgehub.description: AI-powered document management system with permissions, semantic search, RAG, and a chatbot over business documents.
knowledgehub.imageAlt: Representative document and AI search preview for KnowledgeHub AI.

elections.description: Platform for processing and visualizing massive electoral datasets with batch pipelines, dashboards, and monitoring.

devflow.description: Platform for visibility into deployments, pipelines, errors, incidents, and engineering team metrics.
devflow.imageAlt: Representative deployment and incident visibility preview for DevFlow.

mcp.description: AI agents connected to real tools through MCP, designed to automate technical and operational workflows.
mcp.imageAlt: Representative AI agents and tool connections preview for MCP Agent Marketplace.

performancelab.description: Laboratory for SQL query analysis, execution plans, index recommendations, and performance comparison.
performancelab.imageAlt: Representative SQL query performance analysis preview.

proteus.description: Modern ERP based on a real system: inventory, billing, credits, permissions, reports, auditing, and an AI assistant.
proteus.imageAlt: Representative ERP operations preview for Proteus 2.0.

footer.name: Juan Tzun
footer.tagline: Full Stack Developer · Java · Spring Boot · Angular · React · AI
